steps.description: Click the "Source Control" tab icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface. The click is targeted on the fourth vertical icon, visually identified by a branch symbol, to open the Source Control panel.
Trigger the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code by pressing Ctrl+Shift+P while viewing the "Get started with VS Code" walkthrough screen in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace.

Type the text 'notifications: show notifications' into the VS Code command palette input at the top center of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace, triggering the "Notifications: Show Notifications" command suggestion.
Press the Enter key to select "Notifications: Show Notifications" from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Changelog" button in the notification panel at the bottom right of the Visual Studio Code window to view update details for Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
